title: Dreams
description: This modpack shows what minecraft can be like. Without changing the basic mechanics, it complements Minecraft and improves the perception of the game.
body:
This modpack shows what minecraft can be like. Without changing the basic mechanics, it complements Minecraft and improves the perception of the game.

The build is based on the distant horizons mod. 
It improves the perception of the game.

There are also a lot of small mods in the build that bring minecraft to perfection.

Therefore, this build is suitable for those who are looking for new sensations from the game, but do not want to play with global mods.
